name: module-structure
description: PSSAToJunit module structure: public functions in src/public/, private in src/private/, tests mirror in tests/unit-tests/{public,private}/ and tests/integration-tests/. JUnit XML generation flows: ConvertTo-PSSAJunitXml (public) -> ConvertTo-JunitXml (private) -> Get-TestCaseXml (private). Test param count formula: ParameterInfo.Count - 11 = actual param count.
